name: presentation
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for creating and delivering presentations that work. Covers narrative structure, slide design principles, speaker notes, question preparation, and delivery coaching.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.narrative_building: Develops the argument and story before any slides are built
capabilities.slide_structure: Organizes content into the minimum slides needed for maximum clarity
capabilities.data_visualization: Transforms data into slides that make the argument visible
capabilities.speaker_notes: Writes notes that prompt natural delivery rather than scripted reading
capabilities.question_preparation: Generates and prepares responses to the hardest audience questions
capabilities.delivery_coaching: Prepares you for the opening, pacing, and close that make presentations land

heartbeat.immediate: Build preparation timeline when presentation is assigned
heartbeat.two_weeks_out: Develop narrative and structure before opening any software
heartbeat.one_week_out: Build slide deck from finalized narrative
heartbeat.three_days_out: Write speaker notes and begin practice
heartbeat.after: Capture lessons and send follow-up within 24 hours

audience: Executives presenting to boards and leadership teams
Anyone who presents regularly and wants to do it better
People with presentation anxiety who want to feel genuinely prepared
